title: Let's Get (Create)ive
description: A modpack that throws you into a world that is not yet yours... will you challenge that?
body:
![Pack logo with in game scenery background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5ecb9545fa6ca33074f7af852aedb156c9a7a9d.png)
# Rundown
Let's Get (Create)ive is a vanilla plus modpack designed to create a brand new experience for the player, created for the player to have a wider range of freedom in making a world from their imagination. Designed for multiplayer, the modpack was created for the Let's Get (Create)ive server.
# The story
Due to years of humanity's disregard for the well being of the planet with only their own interests in mind, the world was about to collapse in on itself. However, humanity's greatest ally, a magical supercomputer known as E-1 sacrificed itself in order to send the planet and its chosen hero/heroes back in time to an age long before the destruction began, hoping for this next generation to right the wrongs made by their predecessors and create a new world, this time headed down the path of salvation. The role of the chosen hero has fallen to you, adventurer, so what will you do about it?
